title: Voidite
description: A small mod for improvning the end
body:
_WARNIG THIS MOD IS VERY FAR FROM FINISHED, please report bugs (there will be bugs)_

**This mod adds some new features to the otherwise bland end dimension**

# features of this mod
- Endsludge a new almost mud block found in the end, a perfect replacement of dark prismarin. with packed versions to.
- End stone brick pillar a new pillar like block which mixes nicely with endstone.
- Purpur Lamp a new light source which looks great with purpur.
- A new ore named Voidite (hence the name of the mod) which will be better than netherite
- Three new biomes called the Suncrown Forest, Sage Forest, and Aminaria pit with new flora and blocks.
- Two new block entitys used to make sheets from voidite, by first anneling it in the Celestalee furnace and then pressing it in Der Hammer Auf Das Ende.
- In the Suncrown forest you can find a new sand which falls slower and has sandstone variants
- The sage forest is a mushroom forest
- The aminraia pit is a large pit in the island with a dense fog

You can read about all the features in the patchouli book

## Additional note
This mod, is as I said before, far from done and more things will come. If you want consistent updates on the progress consider joining the discord
